ticket.title: FIX TOUR/PACKAGE MISMATCH AND MISSING RESULTS ON GDX BOOKING LOOKUP

test_cases.description: Verify GDX 21863 (Ornido, Cebu) returns Tour = 'Cebu City Tour' instead of the incorrect 'PICK-UP & DROP-OFF'.
test_cases.expected_result: Tour field displays 'Cebu City Tour', matching source data.
test_cases.actual_result: Displayed 'PICK-UP & DROP-OFF' instead of 'Cebu City Tour'.

test_cases.description: Confirm with source/booking records whether GDX 21842 (Jandusay), previously unassigned a tour, is correctly resolving to 'Oslob Whaleshark Tour' or whether this is a data/display error.
test_cases.expected_result: If legitimate, source tracker is updated to reflect 'Oslob Whaleshark Tour' as expected; if a display bug, Tour field is corrected to blank/unassigned.
test_cases.actual_result: Displayed 'Oslob Whaleshark Tour' where the expected tracker had no tour name on file. Not yet confirmed with booking team whether this is correct or a bug.
test_cases.comments: Needs confirmation from booking team before marking pass/fail.

test_cases.description: Verify GDX 21784 (Jr., Davao) returns a valid booking result instead of 'Booking not found'.
test_cases.expected_result: Lookup resolves successfully: Destination = Davao, Dates = Jun 22, 2026, Package = Ticket Only.
test_cases.actual_result: Lookup returned 'Booking not found' for GDX 21784 + Last Name 'Jr.'.
test_cases.comments: Currently the booking cannot be retrieved at all via GDX + Last Name.

test_cases.description: Verify Package field accuracy across all destinations (All-In, Tour Only, Tour + Transfer, Land Arrangement, Rebooking, Ticket Only) to ensure no other package-level mismatches exist beyond the ones already found.
test_cases.expected_result: All Package values match source data across all 61 domestic bookings.
test_cases.actual_result: No Package-field mismatches found outside of the destination/date/tour bugs already logged in the other 47 tested bookings; Package field itself has not shown independent errors so far.
test_cases.comments: Broader sweep beyond the specific bugs already logged.

test_cases.description: Verify GDX + Last Name matching logic does not silently fail for edge-case last names (e.g., 'Jr.', hyphenated names like 'Somera-Arrobang', or names with special characters like 'Peñaloga' and 'Valeña').
test_cases.expected_result: All edge-case last name formats match correctly and do not produce false 'Booking not found' results.
test_cases.actual_result: Somera-Arrobang (hyphenated) and Peñaloga/Valeña (special characters) all matched correctly where destination was otherwise resolvable. Only 'Jr.' (GDX 21784) failed to match, suggesting the suffix-style last name, not the special-character handling, is the likely trigger.
test_cases.comments: Root-cause check for the GDX 21784 not-found issue - points to suffix-format last names as the likely trigger.
